title: Savory Crunchy Garlic Crumbly Stir-fry
description: A hearty vegan Chinese dish perfect for cold days with a blend of garlic, chili sauce, and crispy textures.
instructions: Mince the garlic finely. Chop the green onions into rings.
If using peanuts, crush them slightly in a mortar and pestle for added texture.
Heat some oil in a wok or large frying pan over medium-high heat. Add peanuts if used, followed by the minced garlic.
Add soy sauce and chili sauce to the pan, stirring until fragrant and well combined with the garlic.
Fold in chopped green onions and bean sprouts into the sauce mixture.
Place vegan chicken patties on top of the sauce, adjusting heat for a short stir-fry time so as not to overcook the proteins.
Cover partially or let simmer for 2-3 minutes until the chicken is heated through but still moist. Adjust seasoning if needed.
Serve hot with additional chili sauce and chopped green onions on top.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
